examples: The curtain rises toward the end of the Prelude.
For him, reading was a necessary prelude to sleep.
They were stories of a god who violently slays the forces of chaos, represented as watery dragons, as a prelude to creation.
This hearty dish is the perfect prelude to a mellow afternoon of kayaking on the bottle-green lake.
The Ali shuffle, once a prelude to devastating one-two punches, now mean something entirely different.
